# Vault wiki template (LLM-wiki + Orca)

Copy this folder into your **Obsidian vault root** (or merge `wiki/`, `raw/`, and `Orca/` into an existing vault). Open that vault as the Orca workspace so MemPalace and tools see the same paths.

- See `wiki/SCHEMA.md` for conventions.
- Orca skill: `/orca-vault-wiki` (installed under `.cursor/skills` in this repo) for ingest/query/lint playbooks.
